2026-02-26FINCustoms TariffOrder Replacing the Schedule to the United States Surtax Remission Order (Motor Vehicles 2025)Order Replacing the Schedule to the United States Surtax Remission Order (Motor Vehicles 2025) in order to adjust the quantity of U.S. assembled vehicles that one company may import duty-free.N/A
subject: Order Replacing the Schedule to the United States Surtax Remission Order (Motor Vehicles 2025)
precis: Order Replacing the Schedule to the United States Surtax Remission Order (Motor Vehicles 2025) in order to adjust the quantity of U.S. assembled vehicles that one company may import duty-free.
